body:
Fixes #2045

## Summary

- lower the built-in `HIVE_MIND_DISK_THRESHOLD` default from `0.8` to `0.65` for both the structured disk threshold and legacy `DISK_THRESHOLD` alias
- preserve the `enqueue` strategy and all environment-variable overrides
- update queue and limits-display regression coverage for the 65% threshold
- add the required patch changeset for the safer disk-headroom default

## Reproduction

Before this change, importing the default queue configuration produced `0.8` for both disk configuration paths and `80` for `DISPLAY_THRESHOLDS.DISK`. The regression tests now assert `0.65`, `0.65`, and `65`, respectively.

## Verification

- `node scripts/validate-changeset.mjs` with the PR base/head SHAs
- `node tests/queue-config.test.mjs` (25 passed)
- `node tests/test-issue-1981-disk-defaults.mjs` (8 passed)
- `node tests/limits-display.test.mjs` (68 passed)
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`

`npm test` was also exercised locally under Node 20.20.2 and progressed through the threshold-related suites after the stale display assertion was fixed. It later stopped at the unrelated `tests/test-hive-no-silent-failure.mjs` `hive --help` check; the project and CI require Node 24+.

This file will be removed when the task is complete.

title: fix: lower default disk admission threshold to 65%
